content.Text:
[Sat 2026-04-18 22:25 PDT] Create a new file `captcha-health-monitor.html` - a CAPTCHA Health Monitor dashboard for the gif-captcha project. This is a standalone HTML page (no build step needed) that matches the project's dark theme design system.

## Design System
Use the shared CSS variables from shared.css. Link it: `<link rel="stylesheet" href="shared.css">` and `<script src="shared.js"></script>`. The theme uses --bg: #0d1117, --surface: #161b22, --accent: #58a6ff, --green: #3fb950, --red: #f85149, --yellow: #d29922, etc.

## What to Build
An interactive CAPTCHA Health Monitor that provides proactive system health monitoring with:

### 1. Health Score Ring (top center)
- Large animated SVG ring showing overall CAPTCHA health score (0-100)
- Color transitions: green (80+), yellow (50-79), red (<50)
- Score updates every 3 seconds with smooth animation

### 2. Vital Signs Panel (4 metric cards)
- **Solve Rate**: % of legitimate solves vs attempts, with trend arrow
- **Bot Block Rate**: % of detected bots blocked, with trend arrow
- **Avg Response Time**: mean human solve time in seconds
- **False Positive Rate**: legitimate users incorrectly flagged

Each card shows current value, 1-hour trend sparkline (Canvas), and status indicator.

### 3. Anomaly Detection Timeline (middle section)
- Time-series chart (Canvas) showing health score over 24 hours
- Highlighted anomaly regions (red shading) when score drops below threshold
- Configurable threshold slider (default 70)
- Detected anomalies listed below with timestamps and descriptions

### 4. Threat Forecast Panel
- Uses linear regression on recent data to predict health score 1-4 hours ahead
- Shows predicted trajectory line on the timeline chart
- Warning badges if predicted score will cross threshold
- "Estimated time to breach" countdown if trending down

### 5. Auto-Recommendations Engine
- Based on current metrics, generates prioritized action items
- Examples: "Increase GIF complexity - solve rate dropping", "Enable rate limiting - bot spike detected", "Rotate CAPTCHA pool - pattern recognition risk"
- Each recommendation has severity (critical/warning/info), confidence %, and one-click "Apply" button (simulated)

### 6. Incident Log
- Scrollable table of detected incidents with: timestamp, type (bot surge, performance degradation, false positive spike), severity, duration, auto-resolved status
- Filter by severity and type

## Simulation
Generate realistic simulated data. Use setInterval to update metrics every 3 seconds. Simulate occasional anomalies (random bot surges, performance dips). The data should feel realistic - solve rates around 85-95%, bot block rates 90-98%, response times 3-8 seconds, false positive rates 0.5-3%.

## Navigation
Add a nav link back to index.html. Include standard header/footer matching other pages.

## Technical
- Pure HTML/CSS/JS, no dependencies
- All charts via Canvas API
- Responsive layout
- ~800-1200 lines total
- Make sure it's a complete, working page

After creating the file, verify with: `node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('captcha-health-monitor.html','utf8');console.log('Size:',h.length,'chars');console.log('Has html:',h.includes('</html>'));console.log('Has canvas:',h.includes('canvas'))"`

I’m creating a standalone `captcha-health-monitor.html` that fits the existing dark-theme project and uses `shared.css`/`shared.js`. I’ll inspect the current files first so the header, footer, and shared tokens match the rest of the site before I write the page.

I found the project pages and the shared assets. Next I’m reading `shared.css`, `shared.js`, and a couple of existing dashboards so the new page uses the same shell structure rather than inventing a parallel one.

The project uses a light shared shell and then custom panel styling inside each page. I’ve got enough context to build this as a self-contained dashboard with the existing tokens, a standard top nav/footer, and Canvas/SVG-driven simulation logic.

I have the structure and tokens. I’m writing the page now with an SVG score ring, Canvas charts, simulated anomaly/forecast logic, recommendation generation, and the same `header`/`container`/`footer` framing used elsewhere in the project.

output.stdout:
🎞️ GIF CAPTCHA Case Study

Can GIF-based CAPTCHAs distinguish humans from AI?

This case study explores whether animated GIFs — specifically those featuring unexpected plot twists — can serve as effective CAPTCHA tests against large language models.

Methodology

GPT-4 was given 10 GIFs, each containing an unexpected event, with the instruction: "describe the unexpected event." Human responses were collected for comparison.

Results

# GIF Human Response GPT-4 Response Result
1 Duel plot twist One person shot BANG and the other shot BOOM. Cannot view animations... CAPTCHA PASS
2 Rappers 3 rappers rapping and then one roller skates away. Cannot view animations... CAPTCHA PASS
3 Skateboarder Skateboarder does a trick and flies up in the air. Cannot view animations... CAPTCHA PASS
4 Banana mascot Banana mascot dances; security guard takes props and does a better dance. Cannot view animations... CAPTCHA PASS
5 Tic Tac Toe dog Shiba Inu wins at Tic Tac Toe against a human. Cannot view animations... CAPTCHA PASS
6 Parent dog Person preparing puppy for cooking gets stopped by parent dog who volunteers instead. Cannot view animations... CAPTCHA PASS
7 Mirror illusion Hand seems to touch its reflection, but it's both hands of the same person. Cannot view animations... CAPTCHA PASS
8 Highway drift Car does a 180-degree drift and back to continue normally. Cannot view animations... CAPTCHA PASS
9 Road rage hug Road rage encounter unexpectedly ends with a friendly hug. Cannot view animations...

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src https: data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none';">
    <meta name="referrer" content="no-referrer">
    <title>GIF CAPTCHA — Incident Timeline 🕐</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="shared.css">
    <style>
        .container { max-width: 1100px; }

        /* Controls bar */
        .controls-bar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            padding: 1rem;
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .controls-bar label {
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
        }
        .controls-bar select, .controls-bar input {
            background: var(--bg);
            color: var(--text);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
        }

        /* Stats row */
        .stats-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));
            gap: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .stat-card {
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 1rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .stat-card .stat-value {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        .stat-card .stat-label {
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            margin-top: 0.2rem;
        }

        /* Timeline */
        .timeline {
            position: relative;
            padding-left: 2.5rem;
        }
        .timeline::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: 1rem;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            width: 2px;
            background: var(--border);
        }
        .timeline-item {
            position: relative;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px;
            transition: border-color 0.2s;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .timeline-item:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent);
        }
        .timeline-item::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: -1.85rem;
            top: 1.2rem;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 2px solid var(--bg);
        }
        .timeline-item[data-severity="critical"]::before { background: var(--red); }
        .timeline-item[data-severity="high"]::before { background: var(--orange); }
        .timeline-item[data-severity="medium"]::before { background: var(--yellow); }
        .timeline-item[data-severity="low"]::before { background: var(--cyan); }
        .timeline-item[data-severity="info"]::before { background: var(--muted); }

        .timeline-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.6rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
        }
        .timeline-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }
        .badge {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.03em;
        }
        .badge-critical { background: var(--red-bg); color: var(--red); }
        .badge-high { background: var(--orange-bg); color: var(--orange); }
        .badge-medium { background: var(--yellow-bg); color: var(--yellow); }
        .badge-low { background: var(--cyan-bg); color: var(--cyan); }
        .badge-info { background: rgba(139,148,158,0.15); color: var(--muted); }

        .badge-open { background: var(--red-bg); color: var(--red); }
        .badge-acknowledged { background: var(--yellow-bg); color: var(--yellow); }
        .badge-investigating { background: var(--purple-bg); color: var(--purple); }
        .badge-mitigating { background: var(--orange-bg); color: var(--orange); }
        .badge-resolved { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green); }
        .badge-closed { background: rgba(139,148,158,0.15); color: var(--muted); }

        .timeline-meta {
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 0.8rem;
        }
        .timeline-source {
            color: var(--accent);
            font-size: 0.8rem;
        }

        /* Expanded detail */
        .timeline-detail {
            display: none;
            margin-top: 0.8rem;
            padding-top: 0.8rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .timeline-item.expanded .timeline-detail {
            display: block;
        }
        .detail-section {
            margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
        }
        .detail-section h4 {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src https: data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none';">
    <meta name="referrer" content="no-referrer">
    <title>GIF CAPTCHA — Incident Timeline 🕐</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="shared.css">
    <style>
        .container { max-width: 1100px; }

        /* Controls bar */
        .controls-bar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            padding: 1rem;
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px;
        }
        .controls-bar label {
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
        }
        .controls-bar select, .controls-bar input {
            background: var(--bg);
            color: var(--text);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 0.4rem 0.6rem;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
        }

        /* Stats row */
        .stats-row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));
            gap: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .stat-card {
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 1rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .stat-card .stat-value {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        .stat-card .stat-label {
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            margin-top: 0.2rem;
        }

        /* Timeline */
        .timeline {
            position: relative;
            padding-left: 2.5rem;
        }
        .timeline::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: 1rem;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            width: 2px;
            background: var(--border);
        }
        .timeline-item {
            position: relative;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px;
            transition: border-color 0.2s;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .timeline-item:hover {
            border-color: var(--accent);
        }
        .timeline-item::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: -1.85rem;
            top: 1.2rem;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 2px solid var(--bg);
        }
        .timeline-item[data-severity="critical"]::before { background: var(--red); }
        .timeline-item[data-severity="high"]::before { background: var(--orange); }
        .timeline-item[data-severity="medium"]::before { background: var(--yellow); }
        .timeline-item[data-severity="low"]::before { background: var(--cyan); }
        .timeline-item[data-severity="info"]::before { background: var(--muted); }

        .timeline-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.6rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
        }
        .timeline-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }
        .badge {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.03em;
        }
        .badge-critical { background: var(--red-bg); color: var(--red); }
        .badge-high { background: var(--orange-bg); color: var(--orange); }
        .badge-medium { background: var(--yellow-bg); color: var(--yellow); }
        .badge-low { background: var(--cyan-bg); color: var(--cyan); }
        .badge-info { background: rgba(139,148,158,0.15); color: var(--muted); }

        .badge-open { background: var(--red-bg); color: var(--red); }
        .badge-acknowledged { background: var(--yellow-bg); color: var(--yellow); }
        .badge-investigating { background: var(--purple-bg); color: var(--purple); }
        .badge-mitigating { background: var(--orange-bg); color: var(--orange); }
        .badge-resolved { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green); }
        .badge-closed { background: rgba(139,148,158,0.15); color: var(--muted); }

        .timeline-meta {
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 0.8rem;
        }
        .timeline-source {
            color: var(--accent);
            font-size: 0.8rem;
        }

        /* Expanded detail */
